---
title: "Blog & Essays"
subtitle: "Research translation, technical notes, and career writing from health data practice"
page-layout: full
listing:
  contents: 
    - "../posts/*/index.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: false
  fields: [image, date, title, subtitle, categories, reading-time]
  max-items: 100
  feed: true
---

```{=html}
<div class="blog-shell">
  <section class="blog-hero">
    <div class="blog-hero-copy">
      <span class="section-eyebrow">Writing</span>
      <h1 class="blog-title">From manuscripts and field notes to practical public writing.</h1>
      <p class="blog-lead">This section mixes research translation, health-systems commentary, technical tutorials, and career essays. The common thread is simple: make complex work useful to people who have to act on it.</p>
      <div class="blog-hero-actions">
        <a href="../posts/47-facility-decision-space-chronic-care/index.html" class="btn-solid">Read the flagship essay</a>
        <a href="../research/publications.html" class="btn-ghost">Explore research</a>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="blog-metric-grid" aria-label="Writing overview">
      <article class="blog-metric-card">
        <span class="blog-metric-value">50+</span>
        <span class="blog-metric-label">Published posts across analytics, health, and career growth</span>
      </article>
      <article class="blog-metric-card">
        <span class="blog-metric-value">1</span>
        <span class="blog-metric-label">Accepted first-author BMC Public Health paper translated into public-facing writing</span>
      </article>
      <article class="blog-metric-card">
        <span class="blog-metric-value">4</span>
        <span class="blog-metric-label">Main lanes: research, technical tutorials, impact evaluation, and portfolio building</span>
      </article>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="blog-spotlight-grid">
    <article class="blog-feature-card">
      <p class="blog-kicker">Research spotlight</p>
      <h2>Why facility decision space matters for chronic care in rural Kenya</h2>
      <p class="blog-feature-copy">A plain-language essay built from the accepted manuscript: why medicine stockouts are often a governance problem, not just a procurement problem, and what county reforms should do next.</p>
      <div class="blog-tag-row">
        <span class="blog-tag">BMC Public Health</span>
        <span class="blog-tag">Health financing</span>
        <span class="blog-tag">NCD care</span>
      </div>
      <a href="../posts/47-facility-decision-space-chronic-care/index.html" class="btn-solid">Open essay</a>
    </article>

    <div class="blog-side-stack">
      <a class="blog-link-card" href="../posts/22-reproducible-research-public-health/index.html">
        <p class="blog-kicker">Research methods</p>
        <h3>Why reproducible research matters in public health</h3>
        <p>Transparent workflows, clearer documentation, and why reproducibility is a trust issue in health science.</p>
      </a>

      <a class="blog-link-card" href="../posts/30-health-financial-diaries-explainer/index.html">
        <p class="blog-kicker">Health economics</p>
        <h3>Health financial diaries</h3>
        <p>How high-frequency financial data reveals what standard household surveys often miss about care-seeking and coping.</p>
      </a>

      <a class="blog-link-card" href="../posts/23-r-for-health-researchers/index.html">
        <p class="blog-kicker">Technical writing</p>
        <h3>R for health researchers</h3>
        <p>A practical bridge between analysis, reporting, and reproducible public-health workflows.</p>
      </a>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="blog-topic-grid" aria-label="Blog themes">
    <article class="blog-topic-card">
      <h3>Research translation</h3>
      <p>Turn manuscripts, field observations, and policy questions into writing that health managers, collaborators, and non-specialists can actually use.</p>
    </article>
    <article class="blog-topic-card">
      <h3>Technical notes</h3>
      <p>Tutorials in R, SQL, dashboards, data management, and applied analytics for real project environments.</p>
    </article>
    <article class="blog-topic-card">
      <h3>Career strategy</h3>
      <p>Advice for analysts and researchers building strong portfolios from low-resource settings and practical work experience.</p>
    </article>
    <article class="blog-topic-card">
      <h3>Field systems</h3>
      <p>Lessons from survey operations, monitoring systems, health programs, and the everyday friction that shapes data quality.</p>
    </article>
  </section>
</div>
```

## Latest writing

Recent essays and tutorials, sorted from newest to oldest.
